news.title: Tata Power collaborates with Salesforce to enhance AI for rooftop solar and EV charging growth.
news.summary: Tata Power collaborates with Salesforce to enhance AI for rooftop solar and EV charging growth.

news.title:
RE sector investments in India exceeded ₹2 lakh crore in 2025, a 4-year high.
Growth driven by domestic, international investor interest and market maturity.
news.summary:
RE sector investments in India exceeded ₹2 lakh crore in 2025, a 4-year high.
Growth driven by domestic, international investor interest and market maturity.

news.title:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.

news.title:
Tata Power missed EPS estimates by 23%, reporting ₹2.41 per share, with revenue slightly below forecasts at ₹143b.
Analysts maintain a ₹414 price target, expecting 19% revenue growth by 2027, outpacing the industry average of 9.9% annually.
news.summary:
Tata Power missed EPS estimates by 23%, reporting ₹2.41 per share, with revenue slightly below forecasts at ₹143b.
Analysts maintain a ₹414 price target, expecting 19% revenue growth by 2027, outpacing the industry average of 9.9% annually.

news.title:
India's power demand is surging, driven by AC expansion, AI data centers, and industrial growth. Power Grid reports 7% revenue growth in Q3FY26, revising FY26 capex to ₹32,000 crore.
Tata Power emphasizes renewables, with 66-70% green capacity by 2030. Hitachi Energy sees export growth, driven by HVDC, data centers, and high-speed rail projects, with a ₹7B capex plan for FY26-27.
news.summary:
India's power demand is surging, driven by AC expansion, AI data centers, and industrial growth. Power Grid reports 7% revenue growth in Q3FY26, revising FY26 capex to ₹32,000 crore.
Tata Power emphasizes renewables, with 66-70% green capacity by 2030. Hitachi Energy sees export growth, driven by HVDC, data centers, and high-speed rail projects, with a ₹7B capex plan for FY26-27.

news.title:
Tata Power reports a muted Q3 and addresses discom privatisation delay.
The company is in constant communication with the UP government regarding the issue.
news.summary:
Tata Power reports a muted Q3 and addresses discom privatisation delay.
The company is in constant communication with the UP government regarding the issue.

news.title: Morgan Stanley keeps 'Equal-weight' rating on Tata Power, lowers target price to Rs 399.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley keeps 'Equal-weight' rating on Tata Power, lowers target price to Rs 399.

news.title:
Tata Power projects a net debt to EBITDA ratio of 3.4 and debt to equity ratio of 1.2.
It aims for 50-50 solar and wind capacity by FY27 using in-house produced cells.
news.summary:
Tata Power projects a net debt to EBITDA ratio of 3.4 and debt to equity ratio of 1.2.
It aims for 50-50 solar and wind capacity by FY27 using in-house produced cells.

news.title:
Tata Power plans 2.5 GW capacity additions by FY27, with potential rise to 3 GW.
A 5.2 GW pipeline and ventures in solar and Odisha Discoms to boost performance.
news.summary:
Tata Power plans 2.5 GW capacity additions by FY27, with potential rise to 3 GW.
A 5.2 GW pipeline and ventures in solar and Odisha Discoms to boost performance.

news.title:
Tata Power expects power demand to recover, reaching 270-280 GW due to a warmer summer.
The company targets 2.6 GW renewable capacity by FY26, with 2.3 GW achieved and 400-500 MW in Q4.
news.summary:
Tata Power expects power demand to recover, reaching 270-280 GW due to a warmer summer.
The company targets 2.6 GW renewable capacity by FY26, with 2.3 GW achieved and 400-500 MW in Q4.

news.title:
Nifty's movement hinges on IT stocks, index heavyweights Reliance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and expiry volatility.
Key levels for Nifty are 25,800 resistance and 25,500 support; earnings updates include Trent, NHPC, Tata Power, LIC, and Bharti Airtel.
news.summary:
Nifty's movement hinges on IT stocks, index heavyweights Reliance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and expiry volatility.
Key levels for Nifty are 25,800 resistance and 25,500 support; earnings updates include Trent, NHPC, Tata Power, LIC, and Bharti Airtel.

news.title:
Tata Power reports 4% drop in Q3 net profit to Rs 1,194 crore due to Mundra plant shutdown.
Company is exploring sites for nuclear small modular reactors (SMRs) to expand energy portfolio.
news.summary:
Tata Power reports 4% drop in Q3 net profit to Rs 1,194 crore due to Mundra plant shutdown.
Company is exploring sites for nuclear small modular reactors (SMRs) to expand energy portfolio.

This strategic move was indicated by company executives.

news.title:
Tata Power disclosed compliance under SEBI Regulation 52 (7) & (7A) for Q3 FY25.
No deviations found in utilization of INR 2,000 crore raised via NCDs for debt refinancing.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Power reported Q3 FY26 financials, with total capacity at 26.3 GW.
Clean energy forms 66% of capacity post upcoming projects; revenue and EPS details shared.
news.summary:
Tata Power reported Q3 FY26 financials, with total capacity at 26.3 GW.

news.title:
India aims to triple nuclear capacity by 2032, benefiting stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, and L&T.
NTPC and Tata Power target nuclear growth, while L&T leads in nuclear EPC, ensuring long-term growth potential.
news.summary:
India aims to triple nuclear capacity by 2032, benefiting stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, and L&T.
NTPC and Tata Power target nuclear growth, while L&T leads in nuclear EPC, ensuring long-term growth potential.

news.title:
Tata Power's Q3 results are expected to show mixed performance, with revenue up 6.9% YoY to Rs 16,453 crore but PAT down 22.7% to Rs 918 crore.
Mundra plant losses weigh on profitability, but renewables, solar, and stable Odisha discom operations provide support to earnings.
news.summary:
Tata Power's Q3 results are expected to show mixed performance, with revenue up 6.9% YoY to Rs 16,453 crore but PAT down 22.7% to Rs 918 crore.
Mundra plant losses weigh on profitability, but renewables, solar, and stable Odisha discom operations provide support to earnings.

news.title:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.
news.summary:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.

news.title:
Tata Power commissions 198 MW wind project in Tamil Nadu, supplying 31M units to Tata Steel annually.
The project offsets 26,350 tons of CO2 yearly and was completed in 167 days using self-EPC model.
news.summary:
Tata Power commissions 198 MW wind project in Tamil Nadu, supplying 31M units to Tata Steel annually.
The project offsets 26,350 tons of CO2 yearly and was completed in 167 days using self-EPC model.
